summary: Verified light mode contrast CSS fixes in theme-minimalist.css. All :not(.neo-dark) selectors correctly target light mode only. Dark mode styles are preserved and unaffected.

tests.name: :not(.neo-dark) selector count
tests.details: 164 rules use :not(.neo-dark) to target light mode only

tests.name: bg-slate-9/8 override rules
tests.details: Lines 162-170: Converts dark backgrounds to var(--neo-bg) in light mode

tests.name: Text inside dark containers
tests.details: Lines 402-408: Forces text to hsl(var(--foreground)) in light mode

tests.name: Buttons keep white text
tests.details: Lines 410-420: Preserves white text in bg-primary, bg-gradient, bg-red-5, bg-green-5, bg-orange-5

tests.name: Border visibility rules
tests.details: Lines 536-539: border-white/ converted to hsl(var(--border)) in light mode

tests.name: Dashboard contrast
tests.details: All text dark and readable on light background

tests.name: Opciones modal contrast
tests.details: Modal has light bg, all text readable

tests.name: Config page contrast
tests.details: All tabs, user list, badges visible

tests.name: Automated contrast check
tests.details: 0 contrast issues detected by JS evaluation

tests.name: text-white preserved
tests.details: Automated check confirmed text-white elements remain white in dark mode

tests.name: Dark backgrounds preserved
tests.details: Dark mode dashboard shows original dark styling

light_mode_contrast_fix.details: CSS rules correctly convert dark backgrounds to light and dark text in light mode only

dark_mode_unaffected.details: Dark mode styles preserved with .neo-dark selector rules

button_text_preservation.details: Colored buttons (primary, gradient, red, green, orange) keep white text in both modes

border_visibility.details: border-white/ classes converted to visible borders in light mode

context_for_next_testing_agent: Light mode contrast CSS fixes verified in theme-minimalist.css. Key implementation: 164 rules use :not(.neo-dark) selector to only affect light mode. Dark mode preserved with .neo-dark rules. All screens tested show proper contrast in light mode.
